data.title: Add pre-commit required dep check with structural marker to onboarding SKILL.md Step 0
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Add pre-commit to Step 0's required dependency check in plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md,
alongside the existing bash/coreutils/git checks. Add a machine-readable structural marker
<!-- REQUIRED_DEP: pre-commit --> that the structural test (T1) verifies.

This implements DD1: pre-commit listed and checked in Step 0 dep scan alongside bash, coreutils,
and git; onboarding halts with a clear install instruction if pre-commit is missing.

### What to add
After the existing git dep check block (around line 94 in SKILL.md), add:

1. Structural marker comment:
   <!-- REQUIRED_DEP: pre-commit -->
2. pre-commit check block:
```bash
# Check pre-commit
if ! command -v pre-commit >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    MISSING_DEPS+=("pre-commit")
fi
```
3. Update the install command example shown in the MISSING_DEPS user message to include pre-commit
   (the example already shows `brew install bash coreutils git pre-commit python uv` — verify this
   is already present; if so, no change needed to the message text)

### File to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (Step 0 required deps block, around lines 75-115)

### Verify the change makes T1's marker test GREEN
After this commit, running tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh should show
test_dep_scan_precommit_required_marker passing (PASS).

### Edge Cases
- Idempotency: if pre-commit is already in MISSING_DEPS check, do not duplicate
- The check should use `command -v pre-commit` (same pattern as the git check)
- The halt instruction for missing deps already covers all missing items in MISSING_DEPS array —
  no additional per-dep halt logic needed

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
- [ ] Structural marker <!-- REQUIRED_DEP: pre-commit --> is present in SKILL.md
  Verify: grep -q "REQUIRED_DEP: pre-commit" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] pre-commit dep check block is present in Step 0 section
  Verify: grep -q "command -v pre-commit" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] test_dep_scan_precommit_required_marker passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "test_dep_scan_precommit_required_marker.*PASS"
- [ ] check-referential-integrity.sh passes (no dead path refs introduced)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-referential-integrity.sh
- [ ] check-shim-refs.sh passes (no direct plugin script refs added)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh
